title: Slime's Decor
description: A mod that adds a handful of cool plushies that can be used for decoration!
body:
# Description
This mod adds a couple plushies to your world that you can use as decoration, every plushie is crafted with wool/dye and items that fit the plushie (for example the Fox Plushie is crafted with Orange + White Wool and Sweet Berries).
# Future Plans
- Add more plushies
- Add more functionality to plushies (like having them on your head)
## Suggestions
If you have any suggestions, or find any issues please open a post on github
